runner_ready_findings.title: WORKTREE-DRIFT-BLOCKS-PREFLIGHT
runner_ready_findings.description: The worktree is dirty due to untracked Stage-A audit inputs. Task checklists require an empty preflight status and will halt while these files are present.
runner_ready_findings.suggested_task_outcome: Preflight checks pass with an empty `git status --porcelain -uall` before deterministic runner execution.
runner_ready_findings.notes: If audit artifacts must remain in-repo, commit them in a scoped docs change instead of stashing.

runner_ready_findings.title: MISSING-SUPERSEDING-MVP-MATRIX
runner_ready_findings.description: The archived roadmap marks `docs/reports/mvp-core-loop-closure-matrix.md` as authoritative, but the file is absent and its directory is gitignored.
runner_ready_findings.suggested_task_outcome: A committed authoritative MVP matrix exists at the superseding path, or references are updated to an existing committed document.
runner_ready_findings.notes: Evidence indicates path drift between supersession metadata and committed docs inventory.

runner_ready_findings.title: TASK-CHECKLIST-REFERENCES-MISSING-MATRIX
runner_ready_findings.description: Task 004 checklist gates on grep checks against `docs/reports/mvp-core-loop-closure-matrix.md`; those checks cannot pass as written because the file is absent.
runner_ready_findings.suggested_task_outcome: Checklist commands and traceability checks reference only committed artifacts and succeed without manual path substitutions.
runner_ready_findings.notes: Task checklist determinism is broken by a missing document dependency.

runner_ready_findings.title: CI-SELECTOR-ENV-DRIFT
runner_ready_findings.description: CI exports `CORE_LOOP_*_SELECTOR` variables, but the harness executes a hard-coded selector list and does not consume those environment variables.
runner_ready_findings.suggested_task_outcome: Either the harness consumes `CORE_LOOP_*_SELECTOR` vars, or CI stops exporting unused selector vars to avoid misleading trace output.
runner_ready_findings.notes: Inference from static code search: workflow output implies configurability that is not currently wired.

campaign_derivation_rules.strategy: Prioritize deterministic runner unblockers first, then repair docs/testing traceability for core-loop governance.
